_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: Only csv and xlsx are allowed.
Default max upload size is 10 MB unless configured otherwise.
student_name, grade and consent_obtained are required. section and school_roll_number are optional.
Student name cannot be blank and must be trimmed/normalised.
Grade must be one of the olympiad-eligible grades.
Duplicate within school+participation using school_roll_number if present, else normalised_student_name+grade.
All finalised students must have consent_obtained=true or be covered by school declaration.
Candidate ID must be generated server-side and globally unique.
school_id must be derived from authenticated school_user mapping. Ignore browser-submitted school_id.
School cannot upload/edit students after locked_at unless staff override.
At least one valid student is required to finalise.
Parent contact must remain optional/avoided in MVP unless business/legal review enables it.
